RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0021 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Omar Nguyen Date of Birth: 08/09/1979 SSN (tokenized): TKN-334497 Annual Income: $115,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $27,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN77066AL Honda Sportage 2018 EV Used 47,000 Authorized Signature: Omar Nguyen
